title: Grimoire · Query Letter
description: Extraction schema for query-letter.md. Fields map to **Label:** fill-ins, tables, and checkbox groups in the template. Mark fields with x-source-required: true when the value should cite a source passage.

_source_text.description: Metadata about the source text being analyzed (fill in when using this template for book analysis).

open_with_your_book_in_a_nutshell.description: Open with your book in a nutshell.

who_are_you_and_why_are_you_qualified_to.description: Who are you and why are you qualified to write this book?
